title: fraxinus oxycarpa f. microphylla
intro: Fraxinus oxycarpa f. microphylla, also known as the small-leafed Manchurian ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the olive family (Oleaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Fraxinus oxycarpa f. microphylla include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Fraxinus oxycarpa f. microphylla is commonly prepared as a tea or decoction, and can also be found in various herbal supplements and tinctures.
